commit.message:
fix(orchestration): delete old session file before starting orchestrator

The orchestrator was immediately completing because it was reusing old
session files from previous runs. This caused the agent to think the
task was already done.

Changes:
- Delete existing orchestrator session file before creating new session
- Ensures each orchestration starts with a fresh session state
- Added logging to track session file deletion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: content hash dedup replaces timestamp-proximity dedup (v0.9.15) [BUILD]

Old dedup used ABS(timestamp - ?) < 2 which dropped different messages
sent within 2 seconds. New dedup uses SHA3-256 hash of sender+recipient+
plaintext+timestamp for exact duplicate detection.

- v16 migration: adds content_hash column + index to messages table
- message_backup_exists() now takes content_hash instead of 3-field match
- message_backup_save() computes hash, stores in DB, deduplicates by hash
- Removed redundant exists() call in dht_message_backup restore path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: enforce strict port 5173 to prevent R2 CORS mismatches (#22)

Without strictPort, Vite silently increments to 5174/5175 when 5173
is taken. Those ports are not in the R2 bucket CORS allowed origins,
causing all direct browser-to-R2 uploads to fail with a network error.

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(auth): prevent infinite loading spinner on slow/failed session load

Two bugs causing the stuck loading screen:

1. AuthContext: getSession() had no error handler or timeout. On a slow
   network or Supabase free-tier cold start, the promise could hang
   indefinitely, keeping isLoading=true forever. Added 8s safety timeout
   and .catch() so isLoading always resolves.

2. Layout: used `if (isLoading || !profile)` which showed the spinner
   both during loading AND during the redirect-to-login flight. If the
   redirect was slow or retrying, the spinner appeared infinite. Now
   splits into two conditions: spinner only when isLoading=true, return
   null (no spinner) when !profile so the redirect fires cleanly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: sync admin password from ADMIN_PASSWORD env var on every startup

The upsert in seed.ts had an empty update block, so re-seeding never
updated the password. The update script now also hashes and saves the
env var password on each deploy, fixing the "default password" issue.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: untrack CLAUDE.md and .context/ — local-only AI context docs

These are developer/Claude Code context files, not application code.
They contain VPS IPs and internal references that trigger Netlify's
secrets scanner. Now gitignored — files stay on disk, just untracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: require server cwd=DEMO_DIR in demo.py to prevent worktree pollution

Without this, WorktreeManager(Path.cwd()) picks up the orchestrator repo
and creates .worktrees/ inside it. Server subprocess must be started with
cwd=DEMO_DIR so worktrees stay inside the demo folder.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(security): add IP-based rate limiting to registration endpoints (#233)

Both /api/register and /api/auth/signup-with-verification lacked rate
limiting, allowing attackers to create thousands of accounts and exhaust
Supabase Auth quotas. Adds 5 requests/hour per IP limit with 429 response.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 日付処理をformatDateKey()に統一しタイムゾーンずれを修正

Dateオブジェクトの日付が前日にずれる問題を修正。
- useDragAndDrop: ドラッグ先日付をUTCで作成するよう修正
- 全ファイルの日付文字列生成をformatDateKey()（ローカルタイム）に統一
- 日報詳細の作業時間表示を実作業時間（休憩差引後）に変更
- fetchAssignmentsのエラーハンドリング改善

commit.message:
feat: Add PubChem auto-enrichment, Lipinski profiling & ClassyFire classification

When a phytochemical name is entered during data entry, the system now
automatically fetches molecular identifiers (SMILES, CID, InChIKey),
physicochemical properties (MW, LogP, HBD, HBA, TPSA, formula), and
chemical taxonomy (superclass, class, subclass) from PubChem and ClassyFire
APIs. Adds Lipinski Rule of Five assessment, chemical class filter on
search page, and enriched CSV/API export. All enrichment is best-effort
and non-blocking — data entry works even if APIs are unavailable.

Fix allocation constraintValue to use valid prefix length

length, not a count. Use 24 (valid /24 subnet) which is greater
than the IP block's /16 prefix length.

commit.message:
Support LSP completions for nested struct blocks at arbitrary depth

Change nested block tracking from a single Option<String> to a Vec<String>
that records block names at each depth level. This enables struct field
completions to work at any nesting depth, not just brace_depth == 1.

The resolve_struct_fields_for_path() method walks the struct hierarchy
using the full path of block names to find the correct fields.

Closes #318

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add DB constraints and FK relationships for eureka_sets (#11)

* Migrate domain types to use Supabase generated types

Replace hand-written EurekaSet, EurekaVariant, Obtained, and Category
interfaces with type aliases derived from Tables<> in supabase.ts.
Remove redundant EurekaSets type in favor of Omit<EurekaSet, ...>.
Update column references from name/quality/labels to title/rarity/label
to match the current DB schema.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Replace hand-written row types with Supabase-derived types

Remove custom EurekaSetRow, EurekaVariantRow, and TrialRow from
dashboard.ts in favour of Tables<'eureka_sets'>, Tables<'eureka_variants'>,
and a new Trial type added to eureka.ts. Update admin table components,
the edit eureka set form, and data queries to use current column names
(title/rarity/label instead of name/quality/labels). Add getStyles and
getLabels data helpers; wire style and label selects into the edit form.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add DB constraints and FK relationships for eureka_sets

- Add FK eureka_sets.label → labels.title (with unique constraint on labels.title)
- Add FK eureka_sets.style → styles.title (with unique constraint on styles.title)
- Add CHECK constraint eureka_sets.rarity BETWEEN 2 AND 5
- Regenerate Supabase types to reflect new relationships
- Update rarity select in add/edit forms to show options 2–5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update CLAUDE.md and README.md to reflect schema changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix stale column names and add styles/labels selects to eureka set forms

- Fix getEurekaSet selecting labels → label and add missing created_at/updated_at fields
- Fix edit form submit handler using labels prop array instead of label state
- Fix add form: rename insert fields (name→title, quality→rarity, labels→label), convert style/label TextFields to Select dropdowns backed by styles/labels props, fix trials using t.name→t.title
- Pass styles and labels from page to AddEurekaSetForm via getStyles()/getLabels()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add updated_at to trial table and migrate data fetching to hooks/data.ts

- Add updated_at to Trial type and getTrialsAdmin query; display in TrialTable
- Move all data fetching functions from lib/data.ts to hooks/data.ts
- Update all imports across pages to use @/hooks/data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Rename quality-stars to rarity-stars, update column names, and fix data hooks

Renames quality → rarity and labels → label throughout UI components and forms
to match the updated DB schema. Replaces quality-stars component with rarity-stars,
removes the deleted dashboard-list component, and migrates remaining data fetching
to hooks/data.ts. Also updates docs and workflow files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update CLAUDE.md to reflect hooks/data.ts migration and schema changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix build error, type bug, and cleanup from code review

- Fix eureka-variant/page.tsx importing non-existent getEurekaVariants (renamed to getEurekaVariantsRaw)
- Fix edit-eureka-variant-form.tsx categories prop typed as Color[] instead of Category[]
- Remove stale commented-out EurekaSetOption type and inline type comment
- Fix label|| null missing space in edit-eureka-set-form.tsx
- Unwrap unnecessary Promise.all([getAdminData()]) in dashboard/page.tsx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Refactor hooks and components into domain-specific modules

Split monolithic hooks/data.ts into per-domain files under hooks/data/, rename hooks/eureka.ts to hooks/eureka-helpers.ts and hooks/count.ts to hooks/count-obtained.ts, and relocate shared components (avatar, category, image-upload) into their respective feature directories.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add ColorSelect to eureka set forms and rename eureka-helpers to eureka

- Add ColorSelect component to add/edit eureka set forms with colors prop
- Rename hooks/eureka-helpers.ts to hooks/eureka.ts and update all imports
- Remove unused addEurekaSet cache wrapper from admin hooks
- Add updated_at to edit-trial-form and edit-eureka-variant-form submissions
- Add FK indexes migration and profiles RLS role escalation fix migration
- Update CLAUDE.md to reflect domain-split hooks/data/ structure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix lint warnings and formatting across hooks and forms

- Remove unused MUI imports (Box, Chip, OutlinedInput, Theme, useTheme) from edit-eureka-set-form
- Remove unused getColors import from eureka-variant page
- Fix mixed tabs/spaces and trailing whitespace throughout hooks/data/ files
- Normalize double-quote imports to single quotes in all hooks/data/ modules
- Add missing newline at end of file for all hooks/data/ files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update CLAUDE.md with session learnings and fix stale references

- Fix hooks/eureka-helpers.ts → hooks/eureka.ts references (2 places)
- Remove addEurekaSet from admin/eureka-sets.ts docs (cache() mutation gotcha)
- Add RLS WITH CHECK recursion warning with jwt claims alternative
- Add getUserID() null guard reminder for unauthenticated users
- Add zsh glob expansion gotcha for [slug] paths in git add

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix code review issues: null guard, dead ColorSelect UI, and RLS recursion

- Fix getObtained(user_id!) null assertion in getEurekaSet() — add early
  return guard before calling getObtained so unauthenticated users don't
  trigger a spurious DB query with null coerced to UUID
- Remove ColorSelect from add/edit eureka set forms — colorTitle state was
  never included in the insert/update payload, silently discarding user input;
  remove dead state, handler, prop, and imports until the feature is wired up
- Fix RLS WITH CHECK in profiles migration to use JWT claim instead of a
  sub-select on the same table, which risks infinite recursion in policy eval

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Add .nojekyll to fix images starting with underscore

GitHub Pages uses Jekyll by default, which ignores files starting
with _ (like _DSF*.webp). Adding .nojekyll disables Jekyll processing
so all files are served correctly.

commit.message:
fix(dashboard): guard countdown against invalid/NaN start dates

If an admin saves a bad date (invalid format, wrong month, etc.) the
countdown target becomes NaN. NaN <= 0 is always false, so challengeStarted
never resets to true, leaving the app stuck on the countdown/blur overlay.

Now validates the parsed date before entering countdown mode, and also
checks isNaN(diff) in the tick function so any invalid date falls through
to the started state.

Trigger Railway redeploy — webhook missed for template system commit

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix permissions, auto-close, Slack notifications, and cron schedule

Permissions (ticket-permissions.ts):
- Rewrote validateTicketUpdate to be clean and correct
- Any user who can VIEW a ticket can now do operational updates
  (status, assigneeId, tags, slaStatus) without errors
- CX subDepartment restriction now only blocks editing core fields,
  not status/assignee changes — fixes Sadia and all Associate/Agent roles
- Removed the "unknown fields" error that was blocking legitimate updates

Auto-close (storage.ts, routes.ts, ticket-detail.tsx):
- Added autoCloseResolvedTickets() — closes tickets 24h after Solved
- Runs fire-and-forget on every GET /api/tickets (real-time)
- Also runs in daily cron at 10:30 AM PKT
- Closed is terminal: PATCH blocked on Closed tickets
- "Closed" removed from manual status dropdown in UI
- Lock banner shown on Closed ticket detail page

Slack notifications (slack-web-api.ts):
- sendSlackTicketCreated now matches the new compact message format
- Added .trim() to all env var channel ID reads

Slack reporter (slack-reporter.ts):
- Removed sendDailyReport() from automated cron and button flows
- runFullDailyReports() now awaits before responding (prevents lambda kill)
- Cron updated to 10:30 AM PKT (30 5 * * *)

Status transitions (routes.ts):
- New → Solved now allowed (was previously blocked)
- resolvedAt auto-stamped on Solved, cleared on re-open

Cron (vercel.json):
- Schedule updated from 0 3 * * * to 30 5 * * * (10:30 AM PKT)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

agentboss: generic tmux-based interactive CLI supervisor

Spawn any interactive CLI in a tmux session, read its output, send it
input, and detect its state via pluggable Python detector scripts.
No server, no daemon — every command talks directly to tmux and the
filesystem.

Includes built-in detectors for Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, and generic
CLIs. Wire DI, flock-based liveness, shortest-unique-prefix hash IDs.

commit.message:
SEO: add robots, geo meta, BreadcrumbList schema and sameAs to interstate removalists

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(gateway): remove ensureChannelBindings + merge plugins.allow

Two fixes for the v1.5.16 channels.status regression (fixes #11):

1. Remove ensureChannelBindings() from writeGatewayConfig(). This was a
   one-time migration for non-default accountIds that has already run on
   all v1.5.16 installs. writeChannelAccount()'s ensureWildcardBinding()
   handles new accounts going forward.

2. Change plugins.allow from replace to merge. Previously EasyClaw
   overwrote the allow list on every startup, discarding entries added
   by the gateway doctor (e.g. telegram, qwen-portal). This forced the
   doctor to re-enable channel plugins on every restart, triggering
   config overwrites and slow Telegram probes (~26s timeout in China).
   Now existing allow entries are preserved while EasyClaw's required
   plugins are always included.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Port Manus template system + fix fonts/SERP/ghost recovery

Wave 1 — Critical infrastructure fixes:
- Font rendering: rewrite installFonts() for Railway (no sudo, user-space
  fonts, custom fontconfig, FONTCONFIG_FILE env var)
- Image search: switch from Google CSE to SERP API (serpapi.com) as primary
- Ghost recovery: exclude pending_post and posting from auto-fail SQL

Wave 2 — Cover template system (ported from Manus):
- Add coverTemplateCompositor.ts: 8 cover templates (council_of_players,
  backs_to_the_storm, solo_machine, person_floating_orbs,
  real_photo_corner_badges, left_column_logos, duo_reaction,
  screenshot_overlay) — all output 1080×1350 PNG
- Creative Director: add CoverTemplate type, extended SlideCreativeBrief
  with coverTemplate/additionalPersonQueries/additionalLogoKeys/
  screenshotDescription, system prompt with template selection guide,
  JSON parsing validation, fallback brief with template selection
- Sharp compositor: route cover slides to coverTemplateCompositor when
  template is set, with graceful fallback to generic overlay
- Content pipeline: collect cover assets (person buffers + logo buffers)
  during Stage 5, pass to Stage 6 assembly via SharpSlideInput

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Strengthen blog post: agent-as-admin problem and checks-and-balances framing

The core argument now leads with the real problem — agents themselves are
the primary configuration managers, and different agents/models/contexts
produce different implementations for the same change. Skills provide the
standardized procedures and checks that are missing when agents self-configure.

commit.message:
programs/firefox: fix GPU acceleration for profile app bundles

Launch via `open -n -a` instead of backgrounding with `&` so Firefox
goes through LaunchServices/RunningBoard and gets proper GPU priority
escalation. Also add NSHighResolutionCapable and
NSSupportsAutomaticGraphicsSwitching to the wrapper bundle's Info.plist.

Add auth URL capture tests for Linux and Windows CI (#70)

* Add auth URL capture tests for Linux and Windows CI

Verify that claude setup-token outputs an auth URL that can be
captured. This validates the auth flow works across the subprocess
chain (Docker on Linux, WSL+Docker on Windows).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add comprehensive setup flow tests

- Container image sanity: claude binary works, required dirs exist
- Auth URL capture: claude setup-token outputs capturable URL
- Credential injection roundtrip: verify file exists at correct path
  inside container after auth --token (would have caught docker cp bug)
- Rebuild preserves auth: credentials survive rebuild cycle
- Windows: container sanity + auth URL tests through WSL chain
